goal: Create plugins/slash-commands.js with autocomplete dropdown for /commands in msgInput
sub_tasks: T1: Create IIFE skeleton with __SlashCommandsInited guard
T2: msgInput.addEventListener('input', showDropdownIfSlash) — if value starts with '/' and has no space
T3: showDropdown: create absolute-positioned <ul> under msgInput with matching commands
T5: ArrowUp/ArrowDown navigates items; Enter selects; Escape closes; Tab selects
T6: On select: /new = fetch POST /api/session then checkAuth(), /clear = clear thread, /search = focus searchInput, /theme = toggle light/dark, /help = show commands list in a bubble
T7: If command doesn't send a message, prevent default send behavior (return false or set flag)
guard_focus: Does dropdown contain all 5 commands with descriptions?
Does Enter select but NOT send when dropdown is open?
Does each command do exactly its spec behavior?
notes: ~80 lines. Complex plugin. Dropdown styling should be minimal and consistent with existing UI (use existing CSS vars).
